title: verbascum × coum
intro: Verbascum × coum, also known as Spurge Olive or Coum Mullein, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mullein family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Verbascum × coum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, while its herbal preparations can be used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties. In addition, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make a cough syrup or a salve to treat skin conditions.
